_meta.purpose: Centralized affiliate link registry for pitlog.app. Same shape as 10+ other portfolio sites. Currently Amazon-only; brand enrollments will populate programs as they land.
_meta.format_note: Each program: { brand, base_url, tracking_param, tracking_value, status, network, commission, cookie, notes }. status = pending | queued_signup | enrolled | declined.

amazon.notes: BBQ gear purchase links + KDP book back-matter. Enroll at https://affiliate-program.amazon.com/ after domain goes live. Replace PENDING_TRACKING_ID with actual associate tag.
